readings.Aries: The plan is good. The execution will require improvisation. That part, you were made for. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Taurus: You have been generous with your time. You are allowed to reclaim some of it. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Gemini: Your ability to hold contradictions is genuinely rare. Today it's being tested by something simple. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: You've given your energy to a situation that cannot return it. Time to redirect. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Leo: You see yourself most clearly through the eyes of people who love you. Choose those mirrors. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Virgo: Something is good enough. Let it be good enough. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Libra: Your need for balance is not weakness — it's an accurate reading of what makes systems work. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Scorpio: You've been managing your own depth to avoid frightening people. Today, someone can handle it. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Sagittarius: The future you're planning for is being built in the choices you're making now. Check the alignment. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Capricorn: There is a difference between discipline and punishment. Make sure you know which you're practising. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Aquarius: Your independence is real and it is also sometimes used to avoid being vulnerable. Notice that today. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Pisces: There is something you've been trying to hold together that wants to fall apart constructively. Let it. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
